title: Scratch Doctor Enamel Touch Up Paint 15ml Easy and Quick Drying Suitable for Kitchen Appliances, Bathroom, Metal, Radiator, Fridge, Shower, Sink (White)
features: A BRAND YOU CAN TRUST: Based in the UK, The Scratch Doctor is a trusted brand with 15 years experience in manufacturing specialist household and auto goods. Our team of highly trained experts will ensure the product is right for you whether you’re an industry professional or doing a DIY project.

KITCHENS BATHROOMS AND MORE: Easily restore the look of faded or damaged Enamel with Scratch Doctor’s Enamel Touch Up Paint. Fix Scratches and Chips on Fridges and Ovens. Recolour Baths, Showers and Sinks instantly.

SIMPLE APPLICATION: Our Enamel Paint comes in a handy 15ml bottle with a convenient brush inside the cap for Easy application in and around minor damaged areas of all your Enamel items. Enamel repairs couldn’t be easier for all your household appliances indoors and outside.
QUICK DRYING FORMULA: The paint’s Quick Drying formula makes this the perfect product for DIY repairs around the home. The paint drys to touch in only 30-60 minutes.

OUR GUARANTEE: We believe in our high quality products and we guarantee that they will work as advertised when used correctly. We are always happy to assist you if you have any questions about the use or purchase of your product but if you are not fully satisfied with your purchase we offer a full money back guarantee.
description: Product Description The Scratch Doctor Enamel Touch Up Paint 15ml The Scratch Doctor Enamel Touch Up Paint is a quick and easy way to restore chipped or damaged enamel and rust spots on metal. From kitchen appliances to bathroom fixtures, recolour any enamel surface with our versatile paint in a handy 15ml bottle. Instantly fix scratches and chips on radiators, ovens, fridges, baths, showers and sinks. Quick Dry formula Easily restore the look of rusted metal or damaged enamel Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use Brush included for simple application For Use On Kitchen Appliances, Bathroom Fixtures and Outdoors! Does what it says on the bottle! "Nothing at all to dislike about this product, it was perfect for fixing the rust marks on my washing machine." Works very well! "Easy to apply. Substantial and good coverage. Made enamel bath around rusted plughole like new." Easy to use! "Used on my aluminium garage door, very pleased with coverage." For the Perfect Finish Every Time: Apply the paint with the brush in light, even stokes. Build up the coverage in small, thin layers ensuring each layer is fully dry before applying the next. Ensure bare metal is primed before use. How To Use Clean your surface to remove dirt and oil. Sand high gloss surfaces to ensure full adhesion. Shake well before use. Ensure bare metal is suitably primed prior to painting. Apply the paint using the brush in light, even strokes. Build up the paint in small layers leaving a good dry time between coats. Allow at least 2 hours between coats. Dries to touch in 30-60 minutes. Allow 48 hours to dry before coming into contact with water.
